title: NLP-027-how-to-build-a-chatbot-using-nlp原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-027 How to build a chatbot using NLP?

 27. How to build a chatbot using NLP?
答案要点:
架构:
1. NLU (理解):
   - Intent Classification
   - Entity Extraction
2. Dialogue Management:
   - Rule-based / ML-based
   - Context Tracking
3. NLG (生成):
   - Template-based
   - Neural Generation (GPT)

技术栈:
- Rasa, Dialogflow, Microsoft Bot Framework
- BERT (意图识别) + GPT (回复生成)

质量评分: 95/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
